title: selaginella ivanii
intro: Selaginella ivanii, also known as the spikemoss or ivan's spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginella genus. It is a small, delicate plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce swelling and protect cells from damage. The health benefits of Selaginella ivanii include its ability to improve respiratory function, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Selaginella ivanii can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, where the leaves and stems are steeped in hot water to release their medicinal compounds.
